name: OpenSea
long_description:
OpenSea is your home for trading everything onchain. Founded in 2017, OpenSea pioneered the first non-custodial marketplace for digital assets and has evolved into the destination for the entire onchain economy. Trade tokens, culture, ideas, digital assets, and physical assets across all major blockchains.

At OpenSea, you'll be challenged to exceed your own expectations alongside a nimble, talent-dense crew shaping the future of digital economies for millions. Our culture is centered around those who take ownership, are energized by ambitious challenges, and build with urgency.
one_liner: This isn't just a marketplace; we're shaping the future of digital…
